title: microsorum subhastatum var. longifrons
intro: Microsorum subhastatum var. longifrons, also known as the Long-fronded Pilea or Microsorum, is a type of tropical fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum subhastatum var. longifrons include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
